calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Department 218 this date for settlement conference.
Appearances:David G. Mendez, Esq. for plaintiff, Henry Karnilowicz,
Joanne Kim, Esq. for defendant, Gary M. Waite, present, and Ramona Penikila,not present. This matter settles per stipulation between parties. Stipulation is read into the record. Counsel for the plaintiff is to prepare an order. This matter is to remain on the trial calendar for protective purposes only.
Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire; Clerk: R.Goulding; ReporterJ. Pond,CSR # 5292
